subcodes.first_line: O Ghaffar! I bear witness unto that whereunto the Chosen One hath testified, that verily there is no God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. No partner hath He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غفار اشهد بما شهد المختار انه لا اله الا هو العلیم الحکیم لیس له شریک فی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @prayer for forgiveness
